lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is in pristine condition with no visible damage. The interior is like new and shows no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This car is in good condition, showing it's been well-cared for while still being ready for many more miles. It’s a reliable and stylish choice that looks great and drives even better. Don't miss out on a solid vehicle that balances quality and value perfectly!

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are free of scratches and dents. The interior is in original condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical components are fully functional.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It requires significant mechanical attention; the engine is difficult to start and idles poorly, and the transmission exhibits clear signs of slipping. Cosmestically, the exterior has noticeable rust and body damage, while the interior shows heavy wear and tear. This car would be best suited as a parts donor or a comprehensive restoration project for an experienced mechanic.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant attention to be roadworthy. The exterior shows substantial wear, including visible rust on the wheel arches, several large dents, and paint that is fading and peeling across the hood and roof. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with multiple tears in the seats, and several interior components, including the air conditioning and rear power windows, are currently non-functional. Mechanically, the engine starts but has a persistent knock, and the transmission exhibits slipping. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be best suited as a dedicated project vehicle or for salvage parts.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This offering has undergone a rigorous internal inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. It represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber automobile that balances premium features with proven longevity.

Hi everyone! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s looking for a great new home. It’s been so well-loved and is in wonderful shape for its next adventure! Everything runs smoothly, and it’s super comfortable for those daily commutes or weekend getaways. You’re going to love how this beauty handles—come take it for a spin!

This 996.2-generation Porsche 911 Carrera features the 3.6L M96 flat-six engine, delivering linear power through a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. The IMS bearing has been addressed with a ceramic retrofit, and the rear main seal remains dry. It retains its factory-spec suspension geometry with refreshed bushings for neutral handling and excellent feedback through the hydraulic steering rack. The four-piston monoblock calipers bite firmly on ventilated rotors, and the cooling system has been overhauled with a low-temp thermostat. While the exterior shows a light patina consistent with enthusiast use, the mechanical synchronization and drivetrain integrity are excellent, making this a driver-focused example ready for the apex.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.
Up for sale is a dependable and well-cared-for vehicle that delivers a consistent, high-quality driving experience. The exterior finish is vibrant

This refined motorcar represents a superior acquisition for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating robust mechanical integrity, the vehicle offers a seamless fusion of performance and aesthetic appeal. Every component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability and roadworthiness, presenting an exceptional value proposition in its class.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating robust mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience that balances sophisticated aesthetics with reliable performance. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and longevity. This is an investment in both prestige and utility.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s looking for a new adventure! It’s been super reliable and still looks great inside and out. It drives like a dream and has been really well-maintained, so you can just hop in and go. Perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend trips. I’m sad to see it go, but I know it’ll make the next owner very happy! Come take it for a spin!

Offered is a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 and a tactile 6-speed manual transmission. This chassis maintains its structural integrity with a clean subframe and factory-spec Electronic Damper Control (EDC) settings. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement with VAC coated shells and updated throttle actuators to ensure the individual throttle bodies operate with precision. The M Variable Differential Lock provides exceptional power delivery through the rear wheels, while the engine’s VANOS system remains quiet and responsive. Showing minor cosmetic wear consistent with age, the vehicle remains a driver-focused example with a linear power band and an 8,400 RPM redline that delivers an unadulterated acoustic profile.
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Regular service history. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting a meticulously maintained luxury sedan that perfectly balances performance with everyday comfort. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful, single-owner use. Inside, the premium leather interior remains supple and clean, featuring a smoke-free environment and a fully functional suite of high-tech amenities, including a responsive infotainment system and dual-zone climate control. Mechanically, this vehicle is in strong health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer's schedule, ensuring a smooth, quiet, and responsive driving experience. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the brakes are firm and reliable. Garage-kept and treated with pride, this car offers a sophisticated aesthetic and dependable performance for its next owner. It comes complete with a full service history and both original keys.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and significant aesthetic preservation, it offers an optimal balance of performance and long-term value. Our rigorous inspection confirms its readiness for immediate acquisition, ensuring a high-caliber driving experience for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally maintained vehicle, representing a superior standard of automotive engineering. This unit exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, making it an ideal choice for the discerning driver. Rigorous inspections confirm its readiness for immediate service, offering a seamless blend of reliability and sophisticated performance.

Hey there! I'm so excited to find a new home for my trusty car. It's in really great shape and has been such a reliable ride for me! I've taken excellent care of it, so it runs smoothly and looks fantastic both inside and out. It's the perfect dependable vehicle for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. I'd love for you to come by, take it for a spin, and see for yourself how wonderful it drives!

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully, offering a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the leather seating shows minimal wear, and all technological features—including the premium audio system and navigation—function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from regular, documented servicing. With a solid suspension and a quiet ride, this car is a reliable and sophisticated choice for any discerning driver.

It features a comprehensive service history and remains in commendable condition, ensuring a premium ownership experience for the discerning driver. A superior choice for those seeking a balance of quality and value.

Hey there! I’m so excited to help this reliable beauty find its next home! It’s been such a fantastic ride and is in really solid shape, having been well-loved and looked after. It runs smoothly and is totally ready for all your upcoming road trips. Seriously, you’re going to have a blast behind the wheel—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!
Used car. Condition: good.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs smooth.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-cared-for daily driver that balances performance with everyday utility. The exterior maintains a deep, glossy finish, showing only the minor, expected stone chips from highway use, while the body remains straight and free of significant blemishes. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the leather seating surfaces are supple with minimal bolstering wear, and all original electronic features—including the premium sound system and dual-zone climate control—function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, benefitting from a documented service history that includes a recent fluid flush and brake pad replacement. It handles with precision, shifts smoothly through all gears, and provides a quiet, composed ride. This is a dependable, turn-key vehicle ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. It offers an optimal balance of sophisticated engineering and proven durability.
